nasb.text: Now these are those who came up from Tel-melah, Tel-harsha, Cherub, Addan and Immer, but they were not able to give evidence of their fathers’ households and their descendants, whether they were of Israel:

esv.text: The following were those who came up from Tel-melah, Tel-harsha, Cherub, Addan, and Immer, though they could not prove their fathers’ houses or their descent, whether they belonged to Israel:

cnv.text: 以下這些人是從特．米拉、特．哈薩、基綠、押但、音麥上來的，可是他們無法證明他們的父家或世系是以色列人。

ccb.text: 以下这些人来自特·米拉、特·哈萨、基绿、押但和音麦，但不能证明自己是以色列人的后代：
